div.p: Mechanism: Parser-level recursion where elif is treated as a nested if statement within the else branch of the preceding conditional.
bash if cmd1; then body1 elif cmd2; then body2 else body3 fi
bash if cmd1; then body1 else if cmd2; then body2 else body3 fi fi

ul.li: No ELIF Node: The backend does not implement a dedicated elif handler.
Binary Tree: Execution is reduced to a simple binary search tree of conditionals.
Byte Alignment: ASTNode is 64-byte aligned to prevent cache line splits during AST traversal.
Atomic Evaluation: Each branch corresponds to one test instruction in the VM.
